rationale: Drop the two `forall` extensionality asserts from attempt_01 — those were the 2 verification errors because `EventResults::view` and `NetClient::view` are `closed spec fn`s and a generic field-to-view extensionality lemma cannot be discharged. Replace them with unconditional, per-run `next_ensures(...) ==> conjunct_i` implications (tautologies by inlining the open spec body) so z3 sees the six conjuncts of `next_ensures` in matched shapes across r1 and r2, plus an unfolding of `event_seq` and an explicit naming of the four components of `det_receive_packet_next_equal`.
